title: Workflow item field missing
excerpt: So I’ve just created my first workflow, which I thought might be an opportunity to overcome some of the shortcomings of automations that can’t be modified after creation (yay! I can add intermediate steps!) but I’m still…

posts.author: AntHass (Anthony Hasseldine)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I’ve just created my first workflow, which I thought might be an opportunity to overcome some of the shortcomings of automations that can’t be modified after creation (yay! I can add intermediate steps!) but I’m still having a few challenges (d’oh!)

First, there’s the lack of a “duplicate workflow” feature or copy/paste a group of steps - this has been discussed here already and I am another person keen to see it introduced! Secondly, there’s a missing field in my workflow: the “If column is empty” step doesn’t give me the option to check the column of interest. I can see most of the columns, but not the relevant one! Any ideas as to why that might happen? Hopefully, I’m just overlooking something basic, am I?

image1266×538 53.5 KB

In this screenshot, the option I’m searching for is “Link to Product”, which is a field that should be filled in before the status of the item can be changed to “Complete”. However, that field isn’t one of the available options.
